name: fusion-agent-codex
description: Safe Codex plugin for the Fusion Agent CAD harness.

interface.shortDescription: Use the safe Fusion Agent CAD harness from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Fusion Agent Codex exposes a persistent, mutation-safe Fusion Agent runtime through one public MCP server. Codex plans API-backed scripts while the harness enforces lint, routing, no automatic replay after dispatch, conservative unknown outcomes, contract verification, manifest drift detection, audit artifacts, and Safe Harness fallback without exposing raw Autodesk tools.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Fusion target with programmatic evidence.
Plan and verify a bounded native Fusion change.
Run the safe-vs-fast mock benchmark suite.
